use_cases: FAQ sections where users expand to reveal answers
Settings panels with collapsible option groups
Navigation menus with nested expandable items
Content sections that need progressive disclosure
E-commerce product detail pages with expandable specifications
ai_summary: A flexible accordion component built on base-ui-components/react with three visual variants (default, outline, solid) and two indicator styles (arrow, plus). Features smooth height transitions and icon rotation animations on panel open/close. Uses Tailwind CSS and class-variance-authority for styling, making it easily customizable for SaaS applications, documentation sites, and settings interfaces.
